capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an application development management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has an application development management service.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise application development management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the application development management service reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the application development management service is reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent application development management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the Application Development?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs and KRIs for application development are formalized and documented.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for application development

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the Application Development reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application development KPIs and KRIs are reviewed frequently.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent KPI/KRI review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a strategy on application development?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has an application development strategy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Application development strategy exists

questions.prompt: Does the development strategy incorporate security at the early stages?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the development strategy incorporates security at early stages.
questions.evaluation_focus: Security incorporated at early development stages

questions.prompt: Does the strategy include automation of code and secure provisioning?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the strategy includes automation of code and secure provisioning.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation of code and secure provisioning

questions.prompt: Are the policies and strategies for application development reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application development policies and strategies are reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent review of application development policies and strategies

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have clear business owners for specific applications? Are there separation of duties policies in place?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether clear business owners exist for applications and separation of duties policies are in place.
questions.evaluation_focus: Clear business owners and separation of duties policies

questions.prompt: Do application developers and testers have access only to their specific development environment at staging and not on production?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether developers and testers have access only to staging environments and not production.
questions.evaluation_focus: Developers and testers limited to staging environments

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise adopt DevSecOps Software?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise adopts DevSecOps software.
questions.evaluation_focus: DevSecOps software adoption

questions.prompt: Does the DevSecOps software have capability to provide automation support for various application development milestones?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether DevSecOps software provides automation support for application development milestones.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation support for application development milestones

questions.prompt: Is the CI/CD pipeline utilized for all applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the CI/CD pipeline is utilized for all applications.
questions.evaluation_focus: CI/CD pipeline utilized for all applications

questions.prompt: Does the DevSecOps software configuration get reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether DevSecOps software configuration is reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent DevSecOps software configuration review

questions.prompt: Does the DevSecOps software get integrated with multiple other platforms like workload management, application health monitoring, compliance management, and vulnerability management systems to make sure applications are deployed securely?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether DevSecOps software integrates with workload management, monitoring, compliance, and vulnerability systems.
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with workload management, monitoring, compliance, and vulnerability systems

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise adopt application testing Software?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise adopts application testing software.
questions.evaluation_focus: Application testing software adoption

questions.prompt: Does the software support various features like static and dynamic testing?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the testing software supports static and dynamic testing features.
questions.evaluation_focus: Static and dynamic testing features

questions.prompt: Is testing as part of the CI/CD pipeline utilized for all applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether testing in the CI/CD pipeline is utilized for all applications.
questions.evaluation_focus: Testing in CI/CD pipeline for all applications

questions.prompt: Does the application testing software have capability to perform all types of code analysis as well as manual testing?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application testing software performs all types of code analysis and manual testing.
questions.evaluation_focus: Comprehensive code analysis and manual testing capability

questions.prompt: Does the testing software configuration get reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether testing software configuration is reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent testing software configuration review

questions.prompt: Does the testing software get integrated with multiple other platforms to provide contextual analysis based on valid tests performed on application builds?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether testing software integrates with other platforms for contextual analysis.
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with other platforms for contextual analysis

questions.prompt: Does the application testing software have capability to proactively identify issues in application builds based on specific playbooks?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application testing software proactively identifies issues based on playbooks.
questions.evaluation_focus: Proactive issue identification based on playbooks

questions.prompt: Can the discovery of issues and faults be automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether discovery of issues and faults can be automated.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated discovery of issues and faults

questions.prompt: Does the application testing software have capability to perform static testing for all new applications as part of the CI/CD pipeline?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether static testing is performed for all new applications in CI/CD.
questions.evaluation_focus: Static testing for all new applications in CI/CD

questions.prompt: Can the static testing be automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether static testing can be automated.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated static testing

questions.prompt: Does the application testing software have capability to perform dynamic testing for all new applications as part of the CI/CD pipeline?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether dynamic testing is performed for all new applications in CI/CD.
questions.evaluation_focus: Dynamic testing for all new applications in CI/CD

questions.prompt: Can the dynamic testing be automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether dynamic testing can be automated.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated dynamic testing

capability_questions.capability_name: Application development and testing user management. Removal of developer access from production network

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise utilize CI/CD pipelines to manage user access to developer and production environments?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether CI/CD pipelines manage user access to developer and production environments.
questions.evaluation_focus: CI/CD pipelines manage user access to developer and production environments

questions.prompt: Are developer accounts removed from all applications once deployment to production is complete?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether developer accounts are removed from all applications after production deployment.
questions.evaluation_focus: Developer accounts removed from all applications after production deployment

questions.prompt: Is the developer account removal performed automatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether developer account removal is performed automatically.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated developer account removal

questions.prompt: Does the code scanning software detect developer account anomalies in production code and highlight them to the vulnerability management system for remediation?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether code scanning detects developer account anomalies in production code for remediation.
questions.evaluation_focus: Code scanning detects dev account anomalies in production code

capability_questions.capability_name: Application development owners and business analysts

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have clear separation of duties for all application business owners and developers?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether clear separation of duties exists for all application business owners and developers.
questions.evaluation_focus: Separation of duties for all application business owners and developers

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formally hire business analysts to make sure application requirements are reviewed and translated accurately to development features?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise formally hires business analysts for requirements review and translation.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal business analysts for requirements review and translation

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formally hire a DevSecOps Architect to cater to enterprise-wide applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise formally hires a DevSecOps Architect for enterprise-wide applications.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal DevSecOps Architect for enterprise-wide applications

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formally hire external experts to review code for all applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise formally hires external experts to review code.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal external expert code review

questions.prompt: Are external code reviews performed formally for all applications or only critical ones?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether external code reviews are performed for all applications or only critical ones.
questions.evaluation_focus: External code review scope for all or critical applications
